message.content:
Search the collabspace project at D:/project/pt-gitlab/collabspace for code related to "内网镜像" (intranet mirror) or "复制到内网" (copy to intranet). Look for:
1. Any files with "mirror" or "镜像" in their names or content
2. Controller/service code related to copying or mirroring content
3. Any existing feature for copying content to an internal/intranet system
4. Database tables or entities related to mirrors

Be thorough - check both collabspace-server and collabspace-web directories. Report all relevant files, their purposes, and key code snippets.
